title: Community Moderation Update
body:
Today's moderation actions:

• Banned user 'spam_wave_42' for posting phishing links across multiple channels
• Warned user 'toxic_runner' for targeted harassment against newcomers
• Protected trusted member 'core_maintainer' from false positive report

Remaining reports (medium/low severity) will be reviewed in the next cycle. Please continue reporting any violations to keep our community safe.
